message:
feat: integrate CoW memory allocator into daemon

- Import cow_allocator module
- Add enable_cow config option (default: true)
- Compute .memimg path from WASM/AOT path
- Check for existing memory image on startup
- Initialize CoW in capture mode for first run
- Capture memory state after first instantiation
- Show CoW timing in startup metrics

This enables automatic memory image generation on first daemon
start, with subsequent starts using mmap(MAP_PRIVATE) for ~5μs
instantiation instead of ~184ms.
